name: Honey Roasted Carrots
tagline: Whole carrots roasted dark with honey, thyme, and butter

hero.alt: Roasted whole carrots with honey glaze and thyme
hero.caption: honey carrots — caramelized whole

steps.title: Trim and dry
steps.detail: Scrub carrots; trim greens to a stub. Halve thicker carrots lengthwise so all are even.
steps.tip: Whole carrots roast prettier; halve only the fat ones.

steps.title: Toss and roast
steps.detail: Toss carrots with olive oil, salt, pepper. Spread on a sheet pan with smashed garlic and thyme. Roast at 425°F for 20 min, tossing once.
steps.tip: Don't crowd. One layer; otherwise they steam.

steps.title: Honey-butter glaze
steps.detail: Whisk honey and butter in a small pan over low until melted. Drizzle over carrots; toss.
steps.tip: Glaze at the end — honey burns if added at the start of roasting.

steps.title: Roast 5 more, finish
steps.detail: Return to the oven 5 min for the glaze to caramelize. Plate with the pan juices and a fresh thyme sprig.
steps.tip: A pinch of flaky salt over the glaze hits all the right notes.

healthFacts: Carrots' beta-carotene becomes more available with cooking and fat.
Honey caramelizes around 320°F, faster than sugar — risk of burn at high heat.
